text: Privacy policy
PRIVACY POLICY
Last Updated: 6 February 2026
1. Data Controller Information
Company Name: Photosynth AI LimitedTrading Name: Perry AIRegistered Address: 71–75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London WC2H 9JQ, UKEmail: info@useperry.com
2. What Personal Data We Collect
We may collect and process the following personal data:
Name and contact details (email, phone, address)
Payment and billing information
Website usage data and cookies
Any other information you provide to us
3. Legal Basis for Processing
We process your personal data based on:
Consent - where you have given clear consent
Contract - to fulfill our contractual obligations to you
Legal obligation - to comply with legal requirements
Legitimate interests - for our business operations (where not overridden by your rights)
4. How We Use Your Data
We use your personal data to:
Provide our products/services
Process payments
Communicate with you
Comply with legal obligations
Improve our services
5. Data Sharing
We may share your data with:
Service providers who help us operate our business
Legal authorities when required by law
Third parties with your explicit consent
We do not sell your personal data.
6. Data Retention
We retain your personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes outlined above, or as required by law. Typically:
Customer data: up to 90 days since last interaction, unless needed to resolve disputes or enforce our terms.
Marketing data: Until you withdraw consent
Legal/tax records: As required by applicable law
7. Your Rights
Under UK GDPR, you have the right to:
Access your personal data
Rectify inaccurate data
Erase your data (right to be forgotten)
Restrict processing
Data portability - receive your data in a portable format
Object to processing based on legitimate interests
Withdraw consent at any time
To exercise these rights, contact us at info@useperry.com.
8. Data Security
We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
9. Data Breach Notification
In the event of a data breach that poses a high risk to your rights and freedoms, we will notify you without undue delay and within 72 hours of becoming aware of the breach, as required by law.
10. International Transfers
If we transfer your data outside the UK, we ensure adequate protection through:
Adequacy decisions
Standard contractual clauses
Other approved safeguards
11. Cookies
We use cookies to improve your experience on our website. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings. For detailed cookie information, see our Cookie Policy.
12. Children's Privacy
We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13 without parental consent.
13. Complaints
You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Information Commissioner's Office (ICO):
Website: ico.org.uk
Address: Information Commissioner's Office, Wycliffe House, Water Lane, Wilmslow, Cheshire SK9 5AF
15. Changes to This Policy
We may update this policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes by email or through our website.
16. Contact Us
For any questions about this privacy policy or our data practices, contact us at:
Email: info@useperry.comAddress: Photosynth AI Limited, 71–75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London WC2H 9JQ, UK
